name: THE GOLDEN COMBI
original_name: 最強新コンビ決定戦THEゴールデンコンビ
overview: Sixteen comedians form eight new comedy duos to take on dynamic stage sets and tackle unconquerable prompts! Through eight stages, the 200 audience members will vote for “the least funny duo.” Who will be chosen as the funniest duo and be crowned the best “Golden Duo” to win a cash prize of ten million yen in this grueling survival comedy show?!

trailers.title: 『最強新コンビ決定戦 THEゴールデンコンビ』OFFICIAL本予告②｜プライムビデオ
